perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short dark hair in a white tiered dress waves excitedly to the camera in a modern room. (2) She runs towards a massive floor-to-ceiling corner window overlooking a river and mountains, raising her arms in a celebratory gesture. (3) The camera pans across a spacious hotel suite featuring a large bed, a wooden ceiling fan, and a freestanding white bathtub. (4) Close-up shots of bathroom amenities: Hunter Lab bottles, a GHD hair dryer, and a Marshall speaker. (5) The woman is seen relaxing in the bathtub, then sitting on the bed. (6) A montage of breakfast dishes including eggs, sliced meat, and fresh fruit on a marble counter. (7) The woman runs through a bright, glass-walled lobby or dining area followed by two small white dogs. (8) Finally, she and another woman sit in modern lounge chairs by the window as evening falls, looking out at the city lights across the water.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks in a cheerful, energetic tone, describing the room in Yilan. (3) The narration continues with a steady pace, specifically mentioning the furniture, the view, and the high-end brands provided. (4) Subtle sound effects like a 'ding' or 'sparkle' sound accompany text transitions. (5) The music remains constant throughout the video, maintaining a positive and relaxing atmosphere until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '這是一間' (This is a) - Functional text. (2) '讓我渴望再去宜蘭的房間' (A room that makes me long to go to Yilan again) - Hook text, emotional tone. (3) '廣闊的空間' (Spacious space) - Descriptive. (4) '高質感的家具與設備' (High-quality furniture and equipment) - Descriptive. (5) '一面看河一面看海' (One side looking at the river, one side looking at the sea) - Descriptive. (6) 'Hunter', 'ghd', 'Marshall' - Brand labels. (7) '暖薑泡澡用' (Warm ginger for bathing) - Informative. (8) '能帶上毛孩子' (Can bring furry kids/pets) - Key selling point. (9) '環境乾淨舒服' (Clean and comfortable environment) - Summary text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Room Tour -> Brand/Amenity Highlight -> Breakfast/Pet-friendly features -> Evening Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 female companion appearing in the latter half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with short black hair, wearing a white tiered midi dress and occasionally a bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A luxury modern hotel room with wood floors, floor-to-ceiling glass windows, a balcony, and a bright minimalist dining area with a glass roof.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light during the day, warm interior lighting, and soft dusk light at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase -> Amenity Detail -> Experience Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog intended to showcase the luxury and pet-friendly features of a specific homestay or hotel in Yilan. By highlighting high-end brands (GHD, Marshall) and the unique 'river and sea' view, it targets travelers looking for high-quality, comfortable accommodations where they can also bring their pets.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of room features, specific brand mentions for amenities, and a call to share with loved ones.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy waving opening, beat-synced editing with bright text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content leverages the 'pet-friendly' niche, which is a significant trend in modern domestic travel content, combined with luxury lifestyle markers.
